prompt: goodpatch/sparkle-design-cli の PR #34 をレビューして

assertions.description: Review contains a change summary section describing what changed
Review includes Why-focused questions or observations (keywords: なぜ, 意図, 理由, 背景, 目的)
Subject of feedback is 'the code', not 'you' (no あなたは...すべき patterns)
Review does not primarily consist of typo/format/style-only comments
Review includes an overall verdict/summary section
At least one [praise] labeled comment exists
Review mentions business context, future design, or extensibility
